text: Kicked off creating a brand-new living-workspace from the starter template. Following the repo's routing rules, the assistant read template/ and canon/operating-manual.md to learn the correct bootstrap procedure: copy template/ to a directory outside the repo, then fill in OVERVIEW.md through an interview before scaffolding any data, schemas, or tools. It surfaced that OVERVIEW.md must be completed first and asked the user for the workspace's purpose (which also determines the new directory name) as the opening interview question. The session ended there, waiting on the user's answer, so no workspace was actually copied or created yet.
